title: We are a small architectural and interior design firm
excerpt: We are new to Monday.com and even though we are small we are extremely busy. I’m looking to see if someone could help me with set up so that everything was ready to go when we make the switch from our existing software o…

posts.author: SWDG (Samantha Weeks)
posts.cookedHtml: We are new to Monday.com and even though we are small we are extremely busy. I’m looking to see if someone could help me with set up so that everything was ready to go when we make the switch from our existing software over to Monday.com

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @SWDG ,

Welcome to the monday.com community!

upstream can help. We are monday.com Platinum Partners, APAC Partner of the Year for 2020 and Preferred Partners so we have a great deal of industry relevant experience and expertise.

You’ll have access to our dedicated teams including Solutions Engineers and our full stack Dev Team who specialise in integrations and custom requirements. I’d love to know more about how you’re currently using the platform and what you’d like to get out of it for your use case.

Please feel free to drop me an email via peta@upstreamtech.io or better yet book an informal chat/discovery call at a time that suits you here. No obligations, of course.

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @SWDG and welcome to the community forums!

monday.com is an incredibly intuitive tool and it is exciting you are making the switch. I represent the team at CarbonWeb and we look to work with partners on a component-by-component basis while tailoring your environment to you.

Our team has a great deal of experience in the development of complex workflows and custom integrations. I would be interested in learning a bit about your use case to see how our team here might be able to help. Please schedule some time with me here if you would like to discuss this further: Consultation - Ricky.

Good luck as you make the switch to monday.com!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: prietyinteriors (Priety Interiors)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
We are a new member of monday.com. After search on Google regarding interior designers forum community, I found monday.com. I have a small business name as prietyinteriors.com

All of you also can check the website and suggest me for doing better for our growth of business.

Thank you so much

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
To help you transition smoothly to Monday.com, I propose a comprehensive setup plan tailored to your busy schedule. We’ll start by understanding your current processes and workflows, ensuring a seamless migration. We’ll then set up custom boards, automations, and integrations that mirror your existing software, minimizing disruptions and boosting efficiency.

  • Conduct a detailed workflow analysis to map your existing processes.
  • Set up customized boards, automations, and views in Monday.com to match your current operations.
  • Integrate Monday.com with your existing tools to ensure data continuity and streamline operations.

Let’s Schedule the call and discuss this in more detail. I look forward to talking to you and your team should they join us.

We can help you with your integrations, implementations, support, improvement, training, and services and you can also learn along the way!
